name: dispute-open

input.reason: a long enough reason to file

_note: bounties.dispute-open files a dispute on a bounty. Unknown bounty → 'bounty not found'. Only the owner or a claimant who submitted may open one ('only the owner or a claimant can open a dispute' for outsiders). reason must be >= 10 chars. A second open while one is already open rejects. Sets the bounty to status 'disputed'. No money moves.
